From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Third tier Romanian football league

Football league season

[Divizia C](/wiki/Liga_III "Liga III")

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Season | 1993–94 |
| ← [1992–93](/wiki/1992%E2%80%9393_Divizia_C "1992–93 Divizia C")  [1994–95](/wiki/1994%E2%80%9395_Divizia_C "1994–95 Divizia C") → | |

The **1993–94 Divizia C** was the 38th season of [Liga III](/wiki/Liga_III "Liga III"), the third tier of the [Romanian football league system](/wiki/Romanian_football_league_system "Romanian football league system").[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)

### Renamed teams

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1993%E2%80%9394_Divizia_C&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Renamed teams")]

*Mecanex Botoșani* was renamed as [Cozinda Botoșani](/wiki/Cozinda_Boto%C8%99ani "Cozinda Botoșani").

*Meconerg Onești* was renamed as [Electromecon Onești](/wiki/FC_One%C8%99ti "FC Onești").

*Sportul Călărași* was renamed as [Sportul AGROCONSID Călărași](/wiki/FC_Dun%C4%83rea_C%C4%83l%C4%83ra%C8%99i "FC Dunărea Călărași").

*Rodchim Găești* was renamed as [Chimia Găești](/w/index.php?title=Chimia_G%C4%83e%C8%99ti&action=edit&redlink=1 "Chimia Găești (page does not exist)").

*Laminorul Victoria Zalău* was renamed as [Laminorul Zalău](/w/index.php?title=Laminorul_Zal%C4%83u&action=edit&redlink=1 "Laminorul Zalău (page does not exist)").

*ROVA Roșiori* was renamed as [Sporting Roșiori](/w/index.php?title=ROVA_Ro%C8%99iori&action=edit&redlink=1 "ROVA Roșiori (page does not exist)").

*Rapid Fetești* was renamed as [Rapid Elcom Fetești](/wiki/Rapid_Fete%C8%99ti "Rapid Fetești").

*Victoria Giurgiu* was renamed as [Acvila Giurgiu](/w/index.php?title=Acvila_Giurgiu&action=edit&redlink=1 "Acvila Giurgiu (page does not exist)").

*Unirea Tricolor Oltenița* was renamed as [Navol Unirea Oltenița](/wiki/CSM_Olteni%C8%9Ba "CSM Oltenița").

*Unirea Slobozia* was renamed as [ASA 93 Slobozia](/wiki/AFC_Unirea_Slobozia "AFC Unirea Slobozia").

### Other changes

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1993%E2%80%9394_Divizia_C&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Other changes")]

[Venus Lugoj](/w/index.php?title=Venus_Lugoj&action=edit&redlink=1 "Venus Lugoj (page does not exist)") merged with [Minerul Motru](/wiki/Minerul_Motru "Minerul Motru"), the first one being absorbed by the second one. The new entity was named as [Minerul Venus Motru](/wiki/Minerul_Motru "Minerul Motru").
